summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Mestar agricultural equipment website UI updates. All requested features working perfectly.
passed_tests: Logo image displays correctly in navbar (customer logo, not text)
Logo image displays correctly in footer (same customer logo)
Products section shows 4 equal-size cards side by side in grid layout
Product card hover effect working - machine image becomes visible on hover
Product detail page shows gallery with 1 large + 2 small photos instead of features list
Product detail page shows short description text below gallery
Product detail page displays specs table on left side with 7 specifications
Product detail page has functional 'Get Quote' button (visible and enabled)
Navigation links working correctly (Home, About, Products, Media, Quote pages)
Language toggle working perfectly (EN ↔ TR switching)
